$comment: Source of truth for the 68 React components that need Figma counterparts. Build order: atoms -> molecules -> organisms -> charts. The figma_node_id field is populated by the build-loop and committed back after each component lands.

build_phases.3A_atoms: Independent UI primitives. No internal component dependencies.
build_phases.3B_molecules: Compose 1-3 atoms; single-purpose primitives like Card, ProgressRing.
build_phases.3C_organisms: Composite UI surfaces; depend on atoms + molecules; usually full sections of screens.
build_phases.3D_charts: Static recharts snapshots in Figma; full implementation lives in React only.
build_phases.3F_layout: Page/template scaffolding (PhoneFrame, ScreenShell). Built in Phase 2 as Figma component templates.

Button.$comment: Built 2026-05-28 on Atoms page (17:11). State axis split into separate ButtonState aux ComponentSet (44:11) showing Default/Pressed/Disabled/Loading on Primary Md as documentation; engineering composes via Button. Icon INSTANCE_SWAP deferred to Atom #18 (Icon registry); currently 20×20 placeholder slots toggled by HasLeftIcon/HasRightIcon.

SegmentedControl.$comment: Built 2026-05-28 on Atoms page (17:11). 18 variants: 9 per Size × (Count=2→ActiveIndex 0-1, Count=3→0-2, Count=4→0-3; invalid combos skipped). Pill container with card surface + white-10 1px border. Sora SemiBold. Active=brand/cta+white text; inactive=transparent+white-50 text. Padding/gap bound to spacing/4. Size=Sm: ~52px min-height, 13px (caption text style). Size=Md (added 2026-05-30, C-017): 56px min-height, 14px (used in /subscription). Labels 1/2/3/4 (numeric — designers swap per-instance).

SearchBar.$comment: Built 2026-05-28 on Atoms page (17:11) at x=80, y=1500. 327×52 pill (color/surface/card + 1px white-10 stroke default/filled, brand/cta focused, Elevation/1 shadow). Per-variant: Default+Focused show Placeholder (color/text/quaternary), Filled shows Value (color/text/primary). HasClearButton BOOLEAN linked only to Filled variant (default=true) so it doesn't drag false through variant switches. Search + X icon slots are white-40 16x16 placeholders for Atom #18 swap.

DomainTag.$comment: Built 2026-05-28 on Atoms page (17:11) at x=500, y=1500. 12 Domain variants in 4×3 grid. HUG width 56-106, h=24, radius/sm, padding-x spacing/8, gap spacing/6 (new primitive minted this session = VariableID:52:2). Bg fill = solid bound to color/domain/{name} with paint opacity 0.15 — zero new color tokens; paint opacity multiplies the bound RGB. Dot (6×6 pill) + Label (Small text style + Sora SemiBold override) at full opacity in same domain color. Label TEXT prop dropped: Figma's linked TEXT props share a single default across variants, overwriting per-variant characters — incompatible with per-domain labels. ShowDot BOOLEAN (default true) retained. Designers customize labels via detach if needed.

LevelBadge.$comment: Built 2026-05-28 on Atoms page (17:11) at x=80, y=1740. 15 variants in 5 Rarity × 3 Size grid (332×300 total). Alpha-tinted bg (rarity color @ 0.15) + solid rarity border + ◆/Lv 1 text in same rarity color + Elevation/1. Pill shape, fixed heights Sm=20/Md=24/Lg=28. Padding-x Sm=6/Md=10/Lg=12 (mints spacing/10 = VariableID:62:2). Gap 4 (Sm/Md) or 6 (Lg). Code source has only one styling — Figma expands it to forward-looking rarity system. Level TEXT prop default 'Lv 1'. Gotcha: alpha-tint required a follow-up read-modify-write pass to persist opacity 0.15 (initial setBoundVariableForPaint + spread didn't stick this time even though it worked for DomainTag).

Eyebrow.$comment: Built 2026-05-28 on Atoms page (17:11) at x=460, y=1740. 2 variants (254×96 total). Eyebrow text style (Sora SemiBold 12px UPPER 12% letter-spacing) carries all typography — no fontName override needed. Per-variant fill: Default=color/text/quaternary (matches React white/40), Accent=color/brand/cta (forward-looking; code source has only Default). Text TEXT prop default 'EYEBROW'. Gotcha: setting fontName after setTextStyleIdAsync — even to the same font the style already uses — breaks the textStyleId link. Required a fix-up re-apply of the style. Going forward: skip the fontName-override step when the style already provides the desired weight.

Divider.$comment: Built 2026-05-28 on Atoms page (17:11) at x=80, y=2080. 8 variants (1240×520 total) as a generic primitive — Orientation × Weight (Thin=1px, Base=2px, Bold=3px, Poster=4px). Weight values are intrinsic geometry (not token-bound). Single fill bound to color/alpha/white-10; the 10% alpha is intrinsic to the variable, so no opacity fix-up needed (binding resolved opacity:0.1 cleanly). Set frame has ink-900 bg + radius 24 purely for documentation visibility on Figma's light canvas (does not propagate to instances). Code-Figma mismatch resolved via path (a): React's labeled 'Or continue with' separator becomes a LabeledDivider molecule in Phase 3B, composing Divider + caption text.

BrandSymbol.$comment: Built 2026-05-28 on Atoms page (17:11) at x=1400, y=2080. 4 variants (520×256 total). Sizes: Sm=32, Md=48 (code default), Lg=64, Xl=96. Each variant has a square N×N container with two children: GlowBackground frame (radius/lg, brand-orange@15% opacity bg, Glow/Orange shadow) hidden by default, and a LogoMark VECTOR imported via createNodeFromSvg from public/logos/Logo Mark.svg (single-path, 204×239 viewBox, fill bound to color/brand/cta). Vector preserves aspect ratio, centered horizontally. HasGlow BOOLEAN property at set level toggles GlowBackground.visible. Gotcha confirmed: setBoundVariableForPaint+spread+opacity stripped the alpha — required read-modify-write fix-up to restore opacity 0.15 (LevelBadge precedent applies; Divider precedent does NOT because Divider's alpha was intrinsic to the white-10 variable itself).

BrandWordmark.$comment: Built 2026-05-28 on Atoms page (17:11) at x=80, y=2620. 3 Size variants (656×128 total): Sm=96×24, Md=128×32 (code default), Lg=192×48 — all 4:1 aspect. Each variant contains a 10-vector SVG wrapper FRAME from public/logos/Frame 2147239943.svg, rescaled uniformly via node.rescale(targetW/200). Per-vector fills: 2 orange paths (#FF6704 flame + period) bound to color/brand/cta; 8 white paths (Balencia letters) bound to color/text/primary. No properties, no hardcoded fills. Convention: createNodeFromSvg + rescale() is the canonical pattern for multi-color multi-path SVGs — bind fills per child VECTOR by sniffing original color.

FAB.$comment: Built 2026-05-28 on Atoms page (17:11) at x=816, y=2620. 4 variants (240×240 total) in 2×2 grid. Phase 3A scope = canonical icon-only 56×56 round FAB; React's display='pill' form moves to Phase 3B as FABExtendedPill molecule. Container radius/pill, bg per Variant (cta / surface-card), Ghost adds 1px white-06 inside stroke. State cue: Primary Pressed = Glow/Orange effect (replaces Elevation/2 — brand glow on brand bg); Ghost Pressed = opacity 0.85 frame dim (no brand tint to glow). Icon slot = 24×24 white-40 placeholder frame centered; INSTANCE_SWAP deferred to Atom #18 retrofit (Button/Chip/Input precedent).

ContinuousStroke.$comment: Built 2026-05-28 on Atoms page (17:11) at x=80, y=2900. 4 Weight variants (632×96 total) in horizontal row. Single-path SVG (viewBox 0 0 128 48, path 'M4 22C20 6 42 6 54 21C66 36 86 42 124 12') imported via figma.createNodeFromSvg, VECTOR child extracted and reparented to the 128×48 COMPONENT root. STROKE-ONLY: v.fills cleared, v.strokes bound to color/brand/cta; strokeCap/strokeJoin='ROUND' match the React code's strokeLinecap/Linejoin='round'. strokeWeight is intrinsic geometry (NOT token-bound) per Phase 3A convention: Thin=2, Base=4 (matches React default), Bold=6, Poster=8. Component root has fills=[] (transparent) + clipsContent=false so the stroke is never cropped. React's animated=true mode (CSS strokeDasharray animation) is runtime-only — not statically modeled. CONVENTION: stroke-only single-path SVG — bind v.strokes (not v.fills) since SVG path has fill='none'; setBoundVariableForPaint resolved cleanly (NO opacity fix-up needed since color/brand/cta is full-opacity). Zero new tokens.

MissionTypeBadge.$comment: Built 2026-05-28 on Atoms page (17:11) at x=760, y=2900. 6 Type variants (245×112 total) in 3×2 grid — Row 1: Life/Main/Side (gold/silver/bronze tier), Row 2: Weekly/Daily/Group (steel/sage/copper tier). Pill (radius/pill on all 4 corners), HUG width per label (41-61px), h=24 intrinsic FIXED. Padding-x = spacing/10 (10px, matches React px-2.5), gap 0. Border 1px INSIDE, alpha-tinted via paint-multiplier: bg fill at 20% + border at 35% + text at 100%, all in the matching mission color per variant. ⚠ PAINT-MULTIPLIER ALPHA GOTCHA: setBoundVariableForPaint + spread+opacity did NOT persist on first pass (both opacity read 1) — applied read-modify-write fix-up (v.fills.map(p=>({...p, opacity:0.20})), strokes similar 0.35). LevelBadge/DomainTag precedent. Text: Small text style + Sora SemiBold 11px override + re-apply setTextStyleIdAsync as Eyebrow-precedent fix-up. Per-variant labels Life/Main/Side/Weekly/Daily/Group baked in locally — NO Label TEXT property (DomainTag precedent — per-variant text content differs, linked TEXT prop would clobber all variants with a shared default). HUG width fix-up: primaryAxisSizingMode='AUTO' was reverted to FIXED by the initial resize(60,24); re-applied AUTO post-build to let each variant size to its label. Set frame bg ink-900 + radius 24 for documentation visibility (does NOT propagate to instances). Zero new tokens minted.

SuggestionChip.$comment: Built 2026-05-28 on Atoms page (17:11) at (80, 3100). 2 State variants (288×96 total). HUG width 102 × FIXED h=36 pill. Bg color/surface/card full opacity, border 1px INSIDE royal-purple @ 35% paint-multiplier opacity, text royal-purple full opacity. Button/Sm text style (Sora SemiBold 13px) — no fontName override needed. Scope: State-only axis (option (a) per user). Domain styling is applied per-instance via manual edits — not modeled as a 2nd variant axis (would have been 24 variants for a transient pressed cue). Pressed cue = opacity 0.85 on variant frame (FAB Ghost-Pressed precedent). Label TEXT prop default 'Suggestion' (single shared default OK — text identical across variants). Gotcha confirmed: stroke paint-multiplier opacity required read-modify-write fix-up; HUG width required re-setting primaryAxisSizingMode='AUTO' post-resize. Zero new tokens.

SocialAuthButton.$comment: Built 2026-05-28 on Atoms page (17:11) at (440, 3100). 2 Provider variants (387×188 total, vertically stacked). 327×52 FIXED container per variant: surface-card bg, 1px INSIDE white-10 border (alpha intrinsic — no fix-up, Divider precedent), radius/lg, padding-x spacing/12, gap spacing/8. Per-variant icon strategy: Google = 4-fill SVG via createNodeFromSvg rescaled to 20×20, brand colors NOT token-bound (Google brand-mandate exception); Apple = 20×20 white-40 placeholder for Atom 18 Lucide retrofit. Per-variant labels baked in: 'Continue with Google' / 'Continue with Apple' — NO Label TEXT prop (per-variant text differs — DomainTag precedent). Text style Button/Md (Sora SemiBold 16px, no fontName override). Zero new tokens.

variants.$comment: 142 flat 24×24 Lucide icon COMPONENTs on dedicated '--- Icons ---' page (89:2). Each registered via figma.createNodeFromSvg from node_modules/lucide-static/icons/<kebab>.svg, strokes bound to color/text/primary, ROUND cap/join, strokeWeight=2 intrinsic. Full {pascal→nodeId/key} map in figma-mapping.json → ds_icons. Built 2026-05-28/29 across 9 batches. Retrofit pass wired INSTANCE_SWAP slots on Button (LeftIcon + RightIcon), Input (RightIcon), Chip (Icon), SearchBar (SearchIcon + ClearIcon), FAB (Icon), SocialAuthButton (ProviderIcon, Apple variant only).

Card.$comment: Built 2026-05-29 on Molecules page (17:12) at (80,80). Single Variant axis matching React code: Default=rounded-xl p-6, Compact=rounded-md p-4 (React 'small' renamed to 'Compact' for DS naming), Hero=rounded-2xl p-8. Scope decided via AskUserQuestion: 'Match React code exactly' chosen over the original 3×3 plan (which decoupled Variant×Padding into 9 cells of forward-looking flexibility). Reasoning: code is the source of truth for shape/behavior; 6 of the 9 cells didn't exist in code. Common chrome bound to color/surface/card + color/alpha/white-06 1px INSIDE border + Elevation/1, 327 wide × HUG height. Per-variant radius+padding token bindings (radius/{md,xl,2xl} + spacing/{16,24,32}). Two placeholder text children (Body title + Caption subtitle) — no component props (Card is a slot container; children come from instance overrides). GOTCHA captured for future molecules: figma.createAutoLayout returns FRAMEs which combineAsVariants rejects — variants must be created via figma.createComponent() then have layoutMode set manually. Helper mkAutoComp() wraps this. Zero new tokens minted.

BottomSheet.$comment: 15th Phase 3B molecule (B3 batch, FINAL — completes Phase 3B). SCOPE (match-code): inventory's [Closed,Open] is runtime VISIBILITY, not a structural axis (Closed = not rendered) → DROPPED. The real React axis is the `variant` prop ('route'|'modal') which changes the container chrome → Variant=[Route,Modal]. Both share: 375 FIXED VERTICAL auto-layout, fill color/bg/screen (ink-900), top corners bound radius/lg=20 (rounded-t-lg→--radius-lg), grab HandleRow (h-8=32 center, 36x4 RECTANGLE all-corners radius/pill fill color/alpha/white-20), Header (h-11=44 center, Title + absolute CloseButton), Content (FILL). Route: NO border/shadow, no bottom padding (min-h-full → fills screen; representative h 440). Modal: 1px INSIDE stroke color/alpha/white-08, Elevation/3 (shadow-3), paddingBottom 28 (pb-7), representative h 320. Title = intrinsic Sora SemiBold 17/22 fill color/text/primary, maxWidth 220 truncate-ENDING (text-[17px] font-semibold; H3 is 17 Regular → weight mismatch, no style link). CloseButton = 44x44 createAutoLayout frame, layoutPositioning ABSOLUTE left 16 vertical-center (React absolute left-4), holding X icon instance (registry 100:10 @18, stroke overridden color/alpha/white-60). ContentPlaceholder = Sora Regular 13/18 color/alpha/white-40 (slot filler; real children come from instance overrides). PROPS: Title TEXT (Title#178:0, shared default 'Sheet Title') linked across both; ShowClose BOOLEAN (ShowClose#178:3 default true) gates CloseButton.visible (React renders close only when closeHref/onClose present). Variants laid out side-by-side (Route|Modal) in the set; set frame ink-900 bg + radius 24 for doc visibility (Route is ink-900-on-ink-900 so it blends — intentional, route sheets fill the screen borderless). Zero new tokens minted.

ProgressRing.$comment: Built 2026-05-29 on Molecules page (17:12) at (80,760). 6 variants = Size(Sm=36/Md=48/Lg=96) × Color(Brand/Success). Color axis matches React's two states: Brand=in-progress (color/brand/cta orange), Success=complete (color/brand/success green) — code computes complete=progress>=1. Inventory's 3rd 'Domain' color DROPPED: code has no domain-colored ring and 'Domain' is not a single token (fitness/sleep/… are 12 distinct tokens); recolor per-instance if a screen needs it. RENDERING: each ring is two concentric ELLIPSE donut-arcs via arcData (NOT SVG strokes). Outer diameter = 2*(r+stroke/2) (Sm=34/Md=44/Lg=92), centered in the size×size component; innerRadius = (r-stroke/2)/(r+stroke/2) (0.765/0.818/0.826) yields the band width. Track = full sweep (0→2π) bound to color/alpha/white-10 (alpha intrinsic, no fix-up — Divider precedent). Progress arc = startingAngle -π/2 (top) → -π/2 + 2π·0.75, baked at a representative 75% (arc % cannot be a Figma prop — static snapshot), bound to color/brand/{cta|success} (full opacity, no fix-up). Figma angles increase CLOCKWISE from east, so -π/2 start + positive sweep matches React's -rotate-90 clockwise fill. Rounded linecap (React strokeLinecap='round') NOT modeled — arcData ends are flat radial cuts; acceptable for a static DS snapshot. Percent text: explicit Sora SemiBold at 11/13/20px (Sm/Md/Lg) — NO text-style link because the ramp has no SemiBold style at these sizes (Small/Caption/H2 are Regular); treated as component-intrinsic type. Fill bound to color/text/primary. Percent TEXT prop (key Percent#138:0, default '75') linked to all 6 variants' Percent node (LevelBadge precedent — identical default). Component is a plain (non-auto-layout) fixed canvas with absolute-positioned children — combineAsVariants accepts it. Set frame ink-900 bg + radius 24 for documentation visibility. Zero new tokens minted.

XPBar.$comment: Built 2026-05-29 on Molecules page (17:12) at (80,1180). 2 variants: Default = optional label row (Label left + Amount right, SPACE_BETWEEN) above the track; Compact = track only (matches React's label?-conditional render). Both 327 FIXED-wide VERTICAL auto-layout, itemSpacing bound to spacing/8 (React mb-2). Track = plain FRAME (clipsContent) 327×8, bg bound to color/alpha/white-08 (NEW primitive minted this build = VariableID:140:2, mirrors React bg-white/[0.08]; white-10 was the nearest existing token but 0.08 recurs in XPBar+ChainProgressBar so a dedicated primitive is cleaner). All 4 corners bound to radius/pill. Inner Fill FRAME baked at 70% width (228px) bound to color/brand/cta + radius/pill — progress % can't be a Figma prop (static snapshot). Track height 8px intrinsic geometry (not token-bound — bar-height convention, Divider precedent). Label + Amount = explicit Sora SemiBold 11px (React text-small font-semibold), fill color/alpha/white-50, NO style link (no SemiBold 11px style — component-intrinsic type, ProgressRing precedent). Label TEXT prop (Label#142:0, default 'Level 12') + Amount TEXT prop (Amount#142:3, default '2,400 / 3,000 XP') linked to the Default variant's nodes ONLY (Compact has no label row — no clobbering). Minted 1 new token: color/alpha/white-08.

StatTile.$comment: Built 2026-05-29 on Molecules page (17:12), wrapped in doc frame at (80,1560). SCOPE: matched React code exactly (Card precedent — code is source of truth). React StatTile is just a centered value+label column; the inventory's Variant(Default/Compact) and Trend(Up/Down/Flat) axes + Delta prop DO NOT EXIST in code, so they are DROPPED → no variant axis, lone COMPONENT. (If a screen later needs a trend/delta tile, build a separate StatTileTrend molecule rather than retrofitting an axis no current usage exercises — SettingsRow-Destructive precedent.) VERTICAL auto-layout, HUG/HUG, counterAxisAlignItems='CENTER', itemSpacing spacing/4 (React mt-1). Value = explicit Sora Bold 24px / lineHeight 30px (React text-[24px] font-bold leading-[30px]), fill color/text/primary, NO style link (ramp has no 24px Bold style — component-intrinsic type, ProgressRing/XPBar precedent; tabular-nums OpenType feature not modeled). Label = Caption text style (13px Regular; React is text-[12px] weightless — Caption is the closest clean style link, within tolerance), fill color/alpha/white-50, textAlign CENTER. Value TEXT prop (Value#145:0, default '24') + Label TEXT prop (Label#145:1, default 'Workouts'). Component fills transparent (in screens it's flex-1 inside a metrics row — designers set FILL/width per context) → wrapped in ink-900 doc FRAME 'StatTile (doc)' (145:8), chrome only, no instance propagation. Zero new tokens minted.

MessageBubble.$comment: 11th Phase 3B molecule (B3 batch). SCOPE (match-code): React MessageBubble sender is only 'sia'|'user' (2) — inventory's 3rd 'System' sender DROPPED (no such sender in code) and the WithAvatar axis DROPPED (avatar presence is DERIVED from sender, not a toggle: SIA always shows the avatar, User never does — ProgressRing/StatTile drop-speculative-axis precedent). Sender=SIA/User on Molecules page (17:12) at (80,2520). Each variant = 327 FIXED-wide HORIZONTAL auto-layout (w-full), counterAxisAlignItems MIN (items-start), itemSpacing spacing/8 (gap-2); SIA primaryAxisAlignItems MIN (justify-start), User MAX (justify-end) so alignment reads on the fixed-width variant. SIA variant: 24x24 Avatar (circle radius 9999, fill color/brand/royal-purple, 1px INSIDE stroke royal-purple @50% via read-modify-write opacity fix-up, Glow/Purple effect style, 'S' text Sora SemiBold 11 fill color/text/primary) + bubble. Bubble = VERTICAL auto-layout HUG with maxWidth 250 (React max-w-[250px]), padding 12/10 (px-3 py-2.5), Body text FILL (wraps at 250). SIA bubble: fill color/surface/card (ink-brown-800), 1px INSIDE stroke color/alpha/white-08, corners 16/16/16 + bottom-LEFT bound radius/xs=6 (rounded-bl-xs tail). User bubble (no avatar): fill color/alpha/glow-orange-bg (= brand-orange @15% = React bg-brand-orange/15, exact existing token, no fix-up), 1px INSIDE stroke color/alpha/orange-20 (NEW primitive VariableID:160:3 = rgba(255,94,0,0.2) minted this build, mirrors border-brand-orange/20 which recurs 8x in src), corners 16/16/16 + bottom-RIGHT bound radius/xs=6 (rounded-br-xs tail). 16px corner = arbitrary React value (no radius token) so hardcoded intrinsic; only the 6px tail binds. 15px/22 text = component-intrinsic Sora Regular (NO style link — ramp has no 15px style; ProgressRing/MacroBar precedent). Body TEXT prop (Body#162:0, shared default "Hey! How's your day going so far?") linked to both variants' Body node (LevelBadge shared-default precedent). Set frame ink-900 bg + radius 24 for documentation visibility. Minted color/alpha/orange-20.

WaterIntakeRing.$comment: 8th Phase 3B molecule (B2 batch 'Domain widgets'). 2 State variants on Molecules page (17:12) at (80,1730). State axis = React's achieved boolean (progress>=1) — InProgress (orange/teal wellbeing) vs Achieved (forest-green success), mirroring ProgressRing's Color axis (code derives complete state). SCOPE: own bespoke 200px ring, does NOT instance ProgressRing — ProgressRing's sizes are Sm36/Md48/Lg96 (none=200) and WaterIntakeRing has unique center content (consumed/target stack + Glasses + ml) + glow + status line. RING GEOMETRY (ProgressRing arcData technique): two concentric ELLIPSE donut-arcs 188×188 at (6,6) in the 200-wide ring region. Outer Ø=2*(r+stroke/2)=2*(88+6)=188; innerRadius=(88-6)/(88+6)=0.87234 sets the 12px band. Track = full 0→2π sweep bound color/alpha/white-06 (alpha intrinsic, no fix-up). Progress arc start -π/2 (top) clockwise; InProgress baked 75% bound color/domain/wellbeing, Achieved full sweep bound color/brand/success. Glow = 168×168 ELLIPSE at (16,16) (React inset-4) with LAYER_BLUR 40 (blur-2xl), fill tint @15% paint-multiplier (InProgress=color/domain/wellbeing, Achieved=color/brand/success) — REQUIRED read-modify-write fix-up to persist opacity 0.15 (LevelBadge/MissionTypeBadge precedent). Center column (VERTICAL auto-layout, HUG, CENTER, itemSpacing spacing/4) centered absolutely in the ring via computed x/y: number row (HORIZONTAL, counterAxisAlignItems BASELINE, gap spacing/4) = consumed (Sora Bold 36/40, color/text/primary) + '/' (Sora Regular 24/28, color/alpha/white-40) + target (Sora Bold 36/40, color/alpha/white-50); 'Glasses' (Sora Regular 14/18, color/alpha/white-50); ml caption (Caption-size 13/17 — InProgress Sora Regular bound color/domain/wellbeing @80% paint-multiplier fix-up, Achieved bound color/brand/success full opacity). Status below ring at y=212 (React mt-3): InProgress single line '75% of daily target' (Sora SemiBold 15/20, bound color/alpha/white-60 = NEW primitive minted this build VariableID:147:5); Achieved = status column (VERTICAL, CENTER, gap spacing/4) 'Target achieved +30 XP' (Sora SemiBold 15/20, color/brand/success) + 'at 6:30 PM' (Sora Regular 13/17, color/alpha/white-40). All numeric/15px/14px text is component-intrinsic Sora (NO style link — ramp has no matching SemiBold/Bold size, ProgressRing/StatTile precedent); ml caption is the only Caption-size text and uses explicit Sora Regular 13 (not the Caption STYLE link, to keep it consistent with the rest of the intrinsic-type column). NO TEXT props — center data + status copy differ per variant (DomainTag/MissionTypeBadge per-variant-text precedent); designers override per-instance. Each variant is a plain (non-auto-layout) COMPONENT with absolute children (ProgressRing precedent — combineAsVariants accepts it). Set frame ink-900 bg + radius 24 for documentation visibility (does not propagate to instances). Minted color/alpha/white-60.

MacroBar.$comment: 9th Phase 3B molecule (B2 batch). 3 Tone variants on Molecules page (17:12) at (80,2140) matching React fillClasses: Primary=color/brand/cta, Muted=color/alpha/white-40, Soft=color/alpha/white-20 (all clean bind — cta full opacity, white-40/-20 intrinsic alpha, NO fix-up). Each variant = 327 FIXED-wide VERTICAL auto-layout (counterAxisSizingMode FIXED, primaryAxis HUG height), itemSpacing bound spacing/8 (React mb-2). Children: (1) LabelRow = HORIZONTAL FILL, SPACE_BETWEEN + counterAxis CENTER, itemSpacing bound spacing/12 (gap-3): Label (Sora Regular 15/20, color/text/primary, FILL width) + Value (Sora SemiBold 15/20, color/text/primary, HUG). (2) TrackGroup = VERTICAL FILL, itemSpacing bound spacing/4 (React mt-1): Track (plain FRAME, FILL width × 8 FIXED, clipsContent, bg color/alpha/white-08, all corners radius/pill) holding an absolute Fill RECTANGLE baked 229px (≈70% of 327 — progress % is a static snapshot, XPBar precedent) bound to the per-tone fill + radius/pill; TargetLabel (Sora Regular 12/16, color/alpha/white-40). 15px/12px text is component-intrinsic Sora (NO style link — ramp has no 15px or 12px-Regular style; XPBar/StatTile precedent). Track height 8px + Fill 229px are intrinsic geometry (not token-bound — bar convention, Divider precedent). PROPERTIES (shared identical defaults across all 3 tones → linked TEXT props OK, XPBar/SettingsRow precedent): Label TEXT (Label#152:0, 'Protein'), Value TEXT (Value#152:4, '120g'), TargetLabel TEXT (TargetLabel#152:8, '120 / 150g'), HasTarget BOOLEAN (HasTarget#152:12, default true) gating TargetLabel.visible — all linked on all 3 variants.
